summary: Period Locks Feature Testing - 11/11 backend tests passed, Frontend UI verified. Financial compliance feature blocks writes to locked periods correctly with HTTP 423.

issues: React hydration warning: span inside tbody/option/select - cosmetic only, functionality not affected

critical_code_review_comments: Period lock utility at utils/period_lock.py is clean and well-documented
HTTP 423 status code correctly used for locked periods (standard for 'Locked' resources)
period_locks.py route correctly restricts lock creation to admin/owner and unlock to platform_admin/super_admin only

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Period Locks page renders correctly with all UI elements
